input.background: The average annual salary of 20 female hospital administrators is 80,900. These administrators believe they make less than their male counterparts because of sex bias. Published results suggest that hospital administrators have an average salary of μ= 85,100(σ=10,000).
input.question: Calculate the z_stat and P-value for an observed x̄ of 80,900.

female_administrators_salary.description: The average annual salary of 20 female hospital administrators.

population_mean_salary.description: The average salary of hospital administrators as suggested by published results.

population_standard_deviation.description: The standard deviation of the salary of hospital administrators.

sample_size.description: The number of female hospital administrators in the sample.
